## For new styles — checklist

- [ ] Style name + emoji included
- [ ] Prompt is in a code block
- [ ] Example included (You: / AI: format)
- [ ] Token savings estimated (🟢 / 🟡 / 🔴)
- [ ] Pros listed (at least 2)
- [ ] Cons listed (at least 2)
- [ ] Added to the Token Savings Summary table in README
